title: JavaFX Deployer Handoff
description: Independent validation schema for the deploy-handoff.json file produced by javafx-deployer. This schema validates the handoff artifact documenting deployment configuration for ops consumption, separate from the deployment report schema. Enum values are kept consistent with the definitions in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md and report-templates/report-schema.json. Conditional fields (distribution, rollback) are not required and are present only when the corresponding deployment scope is activated.

project.description: Name of the project being deployed

deployer_version.description: Deployer skill version. Fixed at 1.1 for this handoff format.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the handoff file was created (ISO 8601, e.g., 2026-06-30T10:00:00Z)

deploy_scope.description: Deployment scope declaration, consistent with javafx-deployer/SKILL.md and report-templates/report-schema.json

mode.description: Deployment mode, matching the scope options in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md Step 1

dimensions.description: Activated deployment dimensions. Enum values are identical to report-templates/report-schema.json deploy_scope.dimensions.

ci_cd.description: CI/CD pipeline configuration, consistent with the handoff example in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md

workflow_file.description: Path to the generated build workflow file, e.g., .github/workflows/build.yml

target_platforms.description: Target platforms for the build matrix

release.description: Release management configuration, consistent with the handoff example in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md

workflow_file.description: Path to the release workflow file, e.g., .github/workflows/release.yml

version_script.description: Path to the version bump script, e.g., scripts/bump-version.sh

signing.description: Code signing and notarization configuration, consistent with the handoff example in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md

windows_script.description: Path to the Windows code signing script, e.g., scripts/sign-windows.sh

macos_script.description: Path to the macOS notarization script, e.g., scripts/notarize-macos.sh

required_secrets.description: Signing-specific CI/CD secrets, e.g., WINDOWS_CERT_PFX, APPLE_ID

auto_update.description: Auto-update mechanism configuration, consistent with the handoff example in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md

checker_class.description: Path to the UpdateChecker Java class, e.g., src/main/java/com/example/UpdateChecker.java

config_file.description: Path to the update configuration file, e.g., src/main/resources/update-config.json

manifest_template.description: Path to the server-side update manifest template, e.g., docs/update-manifest-template.json

monitoring.description: Runtime monitoring configuration, consistent with the handoff example in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md

logback_config.description: Path to the Logback configuration file, e.g., src/main/resources/logback.xml

crash_handler.description: Path to the CrashHandler Java class, e.g., src/main/java/com/example/CrashHandler.java

metrics_collector.description: Path to the MetricsCollector Java class, e.g., src/main/java/com/example/MetricsCollector.java

distribution.description: Conditional field: Distribution channel configuration. Present only when store distribution is requested (deploy_scope.dimensions includes 'distribution'). Not in the required list.

channels.description: Target distribution channels. Enum values are consistent with report-templates/report-schema.json distribution.channels.

configs.description: Paths to distribution channel configuration files

flatpak.description: Path to the Flatpak manifest JSON

store_build_flag.description: Maven flag to disable in-app updates for store builds, e.g., -Dstore.distribution=true

in_app_update_disabled.description: Whether the UpdateChecker is disabled for store-distributed builds (stores handle updates)

rollback.description: Conditional field: Rollback strategy configuration. Present only when rollback support is requested (deploy_scope.dimensions includes 'rollback'). Not in the required list.

state_class.description: Path to the RollbackState Java class, e.g., src/main/java/com/example/RollbackState.java

rollback_state_file.description: Path to the rollback state file, e.g., ~/.myapp/rollback-state.json

health_check_job.description: CI/CD job name for post-release health check, e.g., post-release-health-check

runbook.description: Path to the manual rollback Runbook, e.g., docs/rollback-runbook.md

grace_period_hours.description: Grace period in hours for crash counting after an update (default: 24)

crash_threshold.description: Crash count within the grace period that triggers automatic rollback (default: 3)

required_secrets.description: All CI/CD secrets the user must configure in the repository settings, aggregated across signing and other dimensions. Values match the secret names referenced in javafx-deployer/SKILL.md (e.g., WINDOWS_CERT_PFX, WINDOWS_CERT_PASSWORD, APPLE_ID, APPLE_TEAM_ID, APPLE_APP_PASSWORD).

production_feedback.description: Production feedback loop configuration. When health checks or auto-rollback detect production issues, this field provides the data path for orchestrator to record in deploy_result and potentially trigger a new fix round.

health_check_endpoint.description: API endpoint for post-release health checks (crash count, launch success rate)

crash_report_endpoint.description: API endpoint for crash reports, consumed by CrashHandler.maybeReportRemote()

rollback_triggered.description: Whether automatic rollback was triggered post-release

feedback_to_loop.description: Whether production issues should feed back to orchestrator loop-state for a new fix round (default: false — production feedback is informational only by default)
